nasb.text: So the 300 men took the people’s provisions and their trumpets into their hands. And Gideon sent all the other men of Israel, each to his tent, but retained the 300 men; and the camp of Midian was below him in the valley.

esv.text: So the people took provisions in their hands, and their trumpets. And he sent all the rest of Israel every man to his tent, but retained the 300 men. And the camp of Midian was below him in the valley.

cnv.text: 於是眾民手裡拿著食物和號角；所有其他的以色列人，基甸都打發他們各回自己的帳棚去，只留下這三百人。當時米甸營就在他們下面的平原裡。

ccb.text: 于是，基甸留下这三百人，把其余人的食物和号角收集起来，让他们回家。米甸人的军营就在他们下面的山谷里。
